what is this `pc autodoc` command? it writes some bullshit guide???!

The `pc autodoc` command auto-writes wiki definition guides for code entities triggered by dangling slug links, using the capture model with limited context, and the quality issues likely stem from that model or thin context.

no, this is a heaviliy stupid idea and obviously poorly baked (what happens if this is used in a non-rust project?!) plus, who's writing these [[slug]] links? this is completely incorrect and something that will hurt more than help -- what was it role? why was this shit built?

Autodoc was meant to fill Layer 2 entity definitions, but the trigger mechanism rarely fires correctly, it's hardcoded to Rust only, uses a weak model with thin context, and low-confidence guides actively pollute retrieval—so the recommendation is to cut it entirely.
